src/main/java/com/bitbank/OnlineBankingB.general_idea: Register a ModelMapper bean to handle object mapping within the application context.
Configure and register a custom OpenAPI bean to define API documentation, servers, and security schemes.

src/test/java/com/bitbank/OnlineBankingB.general_idea: Remove the deprecated @ExtendWith(SpringExtension.class) annotation and its import, as Spring Boot 2.2+ automatically registers the SpringExtension.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 2.6.3 to 3.1.9 to align with Java 21 support.
Explicitly set the Java version property to 21 for the build.
Add Spring Boot Starter Test dependency for testing support.
Add Spring Boot Starter Validation dependency for bean validation.
Add Spring Boot Starter Data JPA dependency for database access.
Add Spring Boot Starter Web dependency for web services.
Add Spring Cloud Starter Config dependency for externalized configuration.
Add H2 in-memory database dependency for testing or development.
Update Lombok dependency to version 1.18.30.
Add Spring Security Test dependency for security testing.
Update MySQL Connector/J to version 8.0.33.
Add ModelMapper dependency for object mapping.
Add Spring Boot Starter Security dependency for security features.
Add JJWT API dependency for JWT handling.
Add JJWT Implementation dependency for JWT handling.
Add JJWT Jackson dependency for JSON serialization.
Add SpringDoc OpenAPI dependency for API documentation.
Add TOTP library for two-factor authentication support.
Add Spring Milestone repository for accessing pre-release artifacts.
Update JaCoCo Maven plugin to version 0.8.11.
Update JAXB API dependency to version 2.4.0-b180830.0359.
Configure Maven Surefire plugin with timeout and classloader settings.
Add Spring Cloud Dependencies BOM for version management.

.gitignore.general_idea: Ignore local Docker volume directories to prevent committing large or environment-specific data.
Ensure the production environment configuration file is tracked by git despite the general .env ignore rule.
Ignore the OpenRewrite cache directory used by migration tools to keep the repository clean.
Ignore the log file generated by the Spring Boot Migrator tool during the migration process.

LICENSE.general_idea: Update the copyright year range in the license file to reflect the current year.

Makefile.general_idea: Add Makefile targets to check and update Maven dependencies using the versions plugin.
Replace hardcoded SonarQube host URL with an environment variable for better configuration management.
Add a Makefile target to build and push a specific CI/CD Docker image.
Add a Makefile target to build the production Docker image with a specific registry and version.
Add a target to install Docker Buildx and QEMU binfmt to enable multi-architecture builds.
Makefile.human_impl: preparemulti: curl ... buildx ... docker run ... binfmt

Makefile.general_idea: Add a target to build Docker images for both amd64 and arm64 platforms.
Add a target to run the application container with specific environment variables and network settings.
Add targets to stop, remove, and destroy containers and images for cleanup.
Makefile.human_impl: stop: docker container stop ... destroy: docker image rm ...

docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Removed the SonarQube service definition from the docker-compose configuration.
docker-compose.yml.human_impl: Deleted the 'sonarqube' service block including image, volumes, ports, and network settings.

docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Updated the MySQL Docker image to a newer patch version.
Moved the MySQL initialization scripts to a more specific directory structure.
Added a missing newline at the end of the file to comply with POSIX standards.
docker-compose.yml.human_impl: Added newline character at the end of docker-compose.yml.

src/test/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Configure H2 database to emulate MySQL mode and case-insensitivity for better compatibility with production schema.
Prevent H2 database from closing on JVM exit to ensure stability during test execution.
Explicitly set Hibernate JDBC timezone to UTC to avoid ambiguity in timestamp handling.
Add a specific JWT secret key for test environment authentication.
Define JWT expiration time for test environment.
Enable subscription feature in the test environment.
Configure allowed origins for CORS in the test environment.
Set root logging level to WARN to reduce noise in test output.
Set application-specific logging level to WARN to reduce noise in test output.
Disable Spring Cloud Config in tests to avoid external dependency failures.
Disable Open Session in View pattern to improve performance and avoid lazy loading issues in tests.
